title: Janus Deployment Headers CORS CSP Cookie Scan
route: TEST SKILL SECURITY -> custom deployment surface runner -> SKILL 7

deploymentModel.transportException: Janus beta is a packaged local Electron app that binds to loopback. HTTPS/HSTS become mandatory if a non-loopback hosted target is introduced.

compilerStatus.reason: Spec 15 requires direct HTTP/browser header, CORS, cookie, debug and asset-path probes against the target URL.

cases.expectedEvidence: Loopback packaged-local target is documented; hosted HTTPS requirement is an explicit exception
HSTS exists for HTTPS requests in code or local loopback exception is documented
CSP restricts default, object, base, frame ancestor, connect and form sources
Frame, nosniff, referrer and permissions headers are present
Approved packaged-local origin receives credentialed CORS
Hostile origin receives no allow-origin and no credential grant
No insecure Set-Cookie on target responses; any cookies must be flag-safe
Sourcemaps absent from beta build; debug routes disabled; no stack traces
User image/file response headers avoid wildcard credential CORS and keep MIME/cache controls
